headline: Técnico spin-off secures €500,000 to support breast cancer screening - Técnico ULisboa
summary: Técnico spin-off secures €500,000 to support breast cancer screening Técnico ULisboa
editorialNotes: We are approving this news item because it is a positive article about our work, and we want to share good news with our community. The article is from a reputable source (Técnico ULisboa) and provides information about a significant funding achievement for our project. Sharing this news can help raise awareness about our work and its impact on breast cancer screening.
